Scenario_statement: PAs are expanded and newly established (20% of Swiss land area protected by 2030, 30% by 2060); Site selection for new PAs prioritizing species and habitats important for biodiversity, ecosystem processes and functions

Questions/comments: The main problem is the establishment of new PAs. We should ideally use the results of the A4 prioritization exercise but these won't be available for a while.  In the meantime we can alter probs in existing PAs pergaps establish Parc Adula but this will not increase PA coverage to sufficient levels that the scenarios describe.
